items.title: JPMorgan cuts popular crypto stock's price target ahead of earnings
items.description: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE: JMP), the world's largest bank in terms of market capitalization, is well-known for its predictions on the cryptocurrency market. Though JPMorgan has faced accusations of debanking from the industry, the banking giant is reportedly planning to launch crypto ...

items.title: Chinese AI IPOs Surge as JPMorgan, Goldman Initiate Coverage; MiniMax Jumps 230%
items.description: JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs back newly listed Chinese AI developers and chipmakers amid strong investor demand in Hong Kong.

items.title: Microsoft and 18 More Software Stocks That Can Be AI Survivors
items.description: J.P. Morgan says fears of an AI-driven software wipeout are overblown and highlights 19 stocks—from Microsoft to CrowdStrike—it believes are positioned to rebound.

items.title: JPMorgan Announces Cash Distributions for the JPMorgan ETFs
items.description: TORONTO, Feb. 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- J. P. Morgan Asset Management (JPMAM)* today announced the final January 2026 cash distributions for the below listed JPMorgan ETFs. The JPMorgan ETFs trade on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). Unitholders of record on February 18, 2026 will receive cash distributions payable on February 24, 2026. Details of the “per unit” distributions are as follows: JPMorgan ETF nameTicker symbolDistribution per unit ($)Payment frequencyJPMorgan US Ultra-Short Income

items.title: Struggling Coinbase gets price target cut from JPMorgan ahead of Thursday earnings
items.description: Shares of COIN are down nearly 30% this year, with analysts warning that softer trading and crypto prices are likely to weigh on revenue.
